name: Marshal's Warhorn
why: One of the best Epic relics in the game. Its team-wide buffs benefit every faction, making it a core relic for both free-to-play and endgame players.
description: Sounds the Marshal's Warhorn, granting powerful buffs to allies and increasing the overall effectiveness of the entire team. Its universal utility makes it one of the most valuable relics to invest in before obtaining complete Legendary relic sets.
